title: Classic Game Postmortem: Prince of Persia
creator: Jordan Mechner
description: Jordan Mechner looks back at four years of designing, programming, and animating Prince of Persia for the Apple II.
useful: A first-hand production history covering rotoscoped animation, solo development, influences, and scope.
audience: Independent developers, animators, and readers studying early personal computer production.
learning: Understand how rotoscoping shaped character movement
Follow a four-year solo development process
See how technical limits influenced the finished design

manualLinkStatus.note: The official GDC Vault page identifies the session as Classic Game Postmortem: PRINCE OF PERSIA, lists Jordan Mechner as the speaker, and marks it as free GDC 2011 content.

editorial.note: Updated to the official GDC Vault session page and verified the title, speaker, event year, track, and free access.
